title: Ghost vs Zoho Campaigns (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Ghost vs Zoho Campaigns: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Ghost vs Zoho Campaigns: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Ghost and Zoho Campaigns comes down to your specific use case. Ghost is built for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Zoho Campaigns targets Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses

faq.q: Is Ghost better than Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Ghost wins for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Zoho Campaigns is stronger for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Ghost or Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Zoho Campaigns to Ghost?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
